sizing_rule.note: Daily HPR calculation using optimal f dollars as denominator (B variable). Formula: HPR = (A/B) + 1, where A = dollars made/lost in period and B = optimal f dollars. This is a performance normalization metric for portfolio components using Ralph Vince's optimal f methodology.

source_rule_text: Calculate Daily HPR (Holding Period Return) by dividing dollars made or lost by optimal f dollars and adding 1, using consistent time periods across all portfolio components.
